description: Additional metadata for SWAT+ TxtInOut files based on documentation analysis
source: Extracted from docs/EXTENSION_FILE_SCHEMA.md, DEPENDENCY_ANALYSIS.md, and related documentation

null_sentinel_values.description: Values that should be treated as 'no reference' or null in FK relationships

txtinout_fk_behavior.description: In TxtInOut text files, FK references typically point to the 'name' column in target files, not 'id'

exceptions.description: Some files may use 'id' or other columns as FK targets

file_purposes.hru-data.hru: Defines HRUs and links to property files
file_purposes.hmet_water.ini: Heavy metal initialization for water bodies
file_purposes.weather-sta.cli: Weather station configuration and data file links
file_purposes.file.cio: Master configuration file that references all other input files
file_purposes.object.cnt: Object counts for each type in the simulation

init_pattern.description: Files with 'init' field pointing to initialization files

hyd_pattern.description: Files with 'hyd' field pointing to hydrology parameter files

sed_pattern.description: Files with 'sed' field pointing to sediment parameter files

nut_pattern.description: Files with 'nut' field pointing to nutrient parameter files

hierarchical_files.description: Files with multi-line record structures where a single logical record spans multiple physical lines

soils.sol.description: Soil properties with main record line followed by layer data lines

structure.main_record_format: Main line contains soil name and properties, plus layer count
structure.child_line_format: Following lines contain layer-specific data (one line per layer)
structure.main_record_identifier: First data field is the soil name (primary key)
structure.indexing_strategy: Index only the main record line; skip child layer lines

plant.ini.description: Plant community initialization with main record line followed by plant detail lines

structure.main_record_format: Main line contains community name, rotation year, and plant count
structure.child_line_format: Following lines contain individual plant details (one line per plant in community)
structure.main_record_identifier: First data field is the community name (primary key)
structure.indexing_strategy: Index only the main record line; skip plant detail lines

management.sch.description: Management schedules with main record line followed by operation detail lines

structure.main_record_format: Main line contains schedule name, numb_ops (explicit operations), and numb_auto (decision table references)
structure.child_line_format: Following lines: first numb_auto lines are decision table references (from lum.dtl), then numb_ops lines are explicit operations
structure.main_record_identifier: First data field is the schedule name (primary key)
structure.indexing_strategy: Index only the main record line; skip numb_auto decision table reference lines + numb_ops explicit operation lines

d_table.dtl.description: Decision table with condition-action pairs across multiple lines

structure.main_record_format: Multi-line format with conditions and actions
structure.main_record_identifier: Each decision rule set is a logical record
structure.indexing_strategy: Index main decision lines; specific format varies by decision table type

lum.dtl.description: Land use decision table with multi-line condition-action structure

structure.main_record_format: Condition lines followed by action lines
structure.indexing_strategy: Index main decision lines; skip action detail lines

weather-wgn.cli.description: Weather generator parameters with main station record followed by 12 monthly data lines

structure.main_record_format: Main line contains station name, lat, lon, elev, and rain_yrs
structure.child_line_format: Following 13 lines total (1 header line + 12 monthly data lines, one per month)
structure.main_record_identifier: First data field is the station name (primary key)
structure.indexing_strategy: Index only the main record line; skip 1 header line + 12 monthly data lines

atmo.cli.description: Atmospheric deposition data with main metadata record followed by station-specific deposition data

structure.main_record_format: Main line contains num_sta, timestep, mo_init, yr_init, and num_aa
structure.child_line_format: For each station: 1 line with station name, then 4 lines with deposition data (nh4_wet, no3_wet, nh4_dry, no3_dry), each line containing num_aa values
structure.indexing_strategy: Index only the main metadata record; skip station name lines and 4 deposition data lines per station

file_pointer_columns.description: Columns that contain file names/paths rather than FK references to table rows

weather-sta.cli.wgn: Name of the weather generator station

file.cio.description: Master configuration file listing all input files by classification category

format.description: Each line represents a classification with multiple file references
notes: Column 0 is the classification name (primary key)
Columns 1+ are filenames (or 'null' if not used)

file.cio.indexing_strategy: Use classification as primary key, store array of file references per classification

aquifer.aqu.description: This file contains the general physical and chemical aquifer properties.
aquifer.aqu.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

aqu_cha.lin.description: Direct links between aquifers and multiple channels.
aqu_cha.lin.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

initial.aqu.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

codes.bsn.description: This file contains control codes for the simulation of basin-level processes.
codes.bsn.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

parameters.bsn.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

channel-lte.cha.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

hyd-sed-lte.cha.description: This file controls the channel hydrology and sediment properties.
hyd-sed-lte.cha.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

initial.cha.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

nutrients.cha.description: This file controls the channel nutrient properties.
nutrients.cha.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

atmo.cli.description: This file contains observed atmospheric deposition data.
atmo.cli.metadata_structure: Non-standard - first line is reserved for user comments. The second line contains the column headers for the third line, which lists basic information about the atmospheric deposition stations.

weather-sta.cli.description: This file lists the weather stations defined for a SWAT+ setup.
weather-sta.cli.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

weather-wgn.cli.description: This file contains weather generator data to be used for a SWAT+ setup.
weather-wgn.cli.metadata_structure: Non-standard - second line for each weather generator station contains the headers for the following 12 lines, which list the weather generator data for each month of the year. An overview of the weather generator data variables is given in the second table below.

aquifer.con.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)

lum.dtl.description: This file contains land use and management decision tables.
lum.dtl.metadata_structure: Non-standard - first line is reserved for a title. The second line in the file specifies the total number of decision tables included in the file.

management.sch.description: This file is used to schedule management operations.
management.sch.metadata_structure: Non-standard - first line for each management schedule specifies the name of the schedule and the number of scheduled and/or automatic operations. When using scheduled operations, it is followed by one line per operation listing operation-specific data.

ovn_table.lum.metadata_structure: Standard (Line 1: Title, Line 2: Header, Line 3+: Data)
